## What does this change do?

A short description of the change and why it helps. Link any related issue (for example,
"Closes #12").

## How did you test it?

Optional but helpful: how you verified it, and the macOS / Xcode versions you built with.
Screenshots are great for UI changes.

## Anything you are unsure about?

It is fine to open this as a draft and ask. We are happy to help you get it merged.

---

A couple of things that keep the project healthy (no need to tick boxes, just keep them
in mind): the diff stays focused, no credentials or personal data are included, and data
stays read locally and read-only.
